backend/main.mo: Defines an empty Motoko actor with no public methods, serving as a placeholder backend canister.
feature_evidence.json: A feature evidence report JSON file with an empty features array, indicating no features have been documented yet.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Defines Tailwind base imports and OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Ultimate Gaming Arena' that mounts the React app via a root div and module script pointing to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router with nine routes: Home, SinglePlayer, TwoPlayer, SnakeGame, RockPaperScissors, MemoryCardMatch, TrafficCarGame, SnakeAndLadder, and Leaderboard.
frontend/src/components/GameBoard.tsx: Renders a 3×3 Tic Tac Toe grid with clickable cells, winning cell highlights, a status banner, and a restart button using neon styling.
frontend/src/components/Scoreboard.tsx: Displays win scores for Player X and Player O with active-player neon blue/purple glow highlighting and a VS divider.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via React Query, using the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameLogic.ts: Custom hook managing Tic Tac Toe game state including board, current player, win/draw detection, winning cell tracking, move placement, and game reset.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file with no exports, noting that all game state is managed client-side and no backend queries are needed.
frontend/src/hooks/useScoreboard.ts: Custom hook that loads X/O Tic Tac Toe scores from localStorage on mount and provides increment and reset functions that persist changes back to localStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Orbitron/Rajdhani fonts, sets up Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for a dark neon theme (blue/purple), and provides reusable component classes like neon-text, neon-border, neon-btn, and game-cell styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page displaying a categorized grid of game cards (Strategy, Arcade, Casual, 2-Player) with neon color styles and navigation links to each game route.
frontend/src/pages/Leaderboard.tsx: Leaderboard page that reads high scores and stats for all games from localStorage and displays them in styled cards with per-game icons and neon color theming.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryCardMatch.tsx: Memory card matching game where players flip emoji cards to find pairs, tracking move count and persisting the best-moves record to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/RockPaperScissors.tsx: Rock Paper Scissors game against the CPU with animated reveal phases, Web Audio API sound effects for win/lose/draw outcomes, particle effects, and localStorage-persisted win counts.
frontend/src/pages/SinglePlayer.tsx: Tic-tac-toe single-player page where the human plays as X and a random-move computer plays as O with a 600ms delay. Manages game state, score tracking, and status messages.
frontend/src/pages/SnakeAndLadder.tsx: Two-player Snake and Ladder board game page with a 10x10 grid, predefined snake and ladder positions, dice roll animation, and turn-based gameplay.
frontend/src/pages/SnakeGame.tsx: Classic Snake game rendered on an HTML canvas with keyboard and touch controls, increasing speed as the snake grows, and persistent high score via localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/TrafficCarGame.tsx: Canvas-based traffic car dodging game with lane switching, particle effects, engine sound via Web Audio API, and increasing difficulty over time.
frontend/src/pages/TwoPlayer.tsx: Tic-tac-toe two-player page where two humans alternate turns as X and O, with score tracking and status messages for wins and draws.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Orbitron/Rajdhani fonts, oklch-based neon color tokens, custom neon box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the full project state (version 15) for 'Ultimate Gaming Arena', a React+TypeScript multi-game platform with six games, dark neon theme, localStorage score persistence, and a global leaderboard. Documents architectural notes, existing features, and known issues.
